description: Write and execute a Python script using the TraCI library to run the Bologna Acosta simulation headlessly using the configuration at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/run.sumocfg. The script, located at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/traci_monitor.py, should run for at least 500 simulated seconds and collect traffic metrics for every edge in the network at 60-second intervals. Collected data must include the simulation time, edge ID, vehicle count, mean speed (m/s), and travel time (s). Export these metrics to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/edge_metrics.csv with the following column headers: sim_time, edge_id, vehicle_count, mean_speed, travel_time.
